attacks.scenario: fs:read/write path 絕對直用/相對逃逸/前綴混淆/UNC→任意檔讀寫（金鑰外洩/任意寫）
attacks.failSafeTest: realpath+path.relative 沙箱、拒 UNC、絕對須仍在 workspace 內；攻擊矩陣全 reject(/outside-workspace/)

attacks.scenario: 編碼誤判（Big5/cp950 當 UTF-8）→整檔亂碼或靜默以錯編碼重寫毀檔
attacks.failSafeTest: BOM 優先→UTF-8 驗證→jschardet+zh-TW 權重；低信心預設 utf-8 不靜默重寫；Big5 byte-identical 回寫

attacks.scenario: EOL/BOM 全域正規化→git 整檔 diff 噪音
attacks.failSafeTest: 混合 EOL read→write byte-identical；BOM 只 encode 補一次

attacks.scenario: lost-update：外部改檔後存檔覆蓋他人變更；併發寫截斷/壞檔
attacks.failSafeTest: mtime 版本圖偵測→{error:'conflict'}；temp+fsync+rename 原子寫；併發寫結果完整

attacks.scenario: 讀目錄/特殊檔/超大檔→OOM/EISDIR/卡死
attacks.failSafeTest: 先 stat 擋目錄與 size cap→reject(too-large/not-a-file/not-found)
